description: 1. 2 belt pockets, pole holder, whistle included for easy storage2. Enveloping straps and chest strap for stability3. Suitable for adventure racing and other Sports4. Capacity 10LThe bag has an inbuilt water pouch, which cannot be found in other bags, sold within the country. It is essentially made for adventure activities but to be kept away from trekking trips, because of excessive wear and tear.
